title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Texas Instruments India International Enterprises in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
